---
title: "velocity_mean"
generated: true
description: "Fréchet mean of stationary velocity fields (the SVF barycentre)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.geometry.algebra`](../nitrix-geometry-algebra.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:velocity_mean -->
```python
velocity_mean(velocities: Float[Array, 'k *spatial ndim'], *, weights: Optional[Float[Array, ' k']] = None) -> Float[Array, '*spatial ndim']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:velocity_mean -->
Fréchet mean of stationary velocity fields (the SVF barycentre).

A stationary velocity field *is* its own Lie-algebra element, so its
Fréchet barycentre is just the (weighted) arithmetic mean -- the deformable
template centre.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:velocity_mean -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `velocities` | `Float` | `k` × `*spatial` × `ndim` | — | `(K, *spatial, ndim)` stack of `K` stationary velocity fields over a shared spatial grid, each with `ndim` vector components per voxel. |
| `weights` | `Optional[Float[Array, ' k']]` | — | `None` | Optional `(K,)` array of non-negative weights (normalised internally to sum to one); `None` gives uniform weights. |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `*spatial` × `ndim`. The mean velocity field, of shape `(*spatial, ndim)`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:velocity_mean -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `k` | kernel or basis components |
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
| `ndim` | number of spatial dimensions |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
